abilities.name: Chasing Fate
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may drain a (soulstone) to reduce an amount of damage equal to the turn number.

abilities.name: Cumbersome
abilities.text: This model may not scale terrain.

abilities.name: Lone Rider
abilities.text: This model may not be targeted by the actions of friendly models.

abilities.name: Nemesis (U)
abilities.text: The U abilities of enemy models within 3" are blank.

actions.name: Mysterious Blade
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this attack was generated by the Charge action, the target gains a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Wide Swing
triggers.text: Once per activation. When resolving, deal this action's damage -1 to a number of different enemy models within range equal to the turn number.

actions.name: Revel in Secrets
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. For each enemy model within range, reveal one random card in the opposing player's hand. Then choose one of the revealed cards to be discarded and draw a card.

triggers.name: Moonlit Charge
triggers.text: This model declares the Charge action, ignoring engagement and the once per activation restriction.

actions.name: Ride With Me
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may target another friendly model of lower Sz. Move this model up to 5". Then, if this action targeted another friendly model, place the friendly model into base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Clouds Over the Moon
triggers.text: The target may declare the Interact action.
